conflict_categories.name: Ad Blockers
conflict_categories.description: Running multiple ad blockers can slow down your browser, consume more resources, and cause websites to display incorrectly or break entirely.
conflict_categories.recommended_action: Keep only one active ad blocker. Disable or remove others to ensure optimal performance and website compatibility.

conflict_categories.name: VPN Services
conflict_categories.description: Activating multiple VPN extensions simultaneously can lead to network conflicts, unstable connections, IP address leaks, or significantly reduced browsing speed.
conflict_categories.recommended_action: Use only one VPN extension at a time. If you need different VPN services, ensure only one is enabled when in use.

conflict_categories.name: Shopping Coupon Finders
conflict_categories.description: Multiple coupon extensions may override each other's functionality, preventing you from automatically applying the best available deals or causing checkout issues.
conflict_categories.recommended_action: Choose your preferred coupon extension and disable or remove others. You can always enable another if a specific deal requires it.

conflict_categories.name: Tab Managers
conflict_categories.description: Using several tab management extensions can lead to conflicts in organizing, suspending, or restoring tabs, potentially resulting in lost sessions or unexpected tab behavior.
conflict_categories.recommended_action: Select one primary tab manager that best suits your workflow and keep it active. Disable or remove redundant ones.

conflict_categories.name: Proxy/Network Controllers
conflict_categories.description: Multiple extensions attempting to control network proxy settings or modify network requests can cause severe connectivity issues, internet instability, or expose your browsing data.
conflict_categories.recommended_action: Only one network or proxy control extension should be active at any given time to prevent network disruptions and security risks.

conflict_categories.name: Screenshot/Screen Recorders
conflict_categories.description: Using more than one screenshot or screen recording tool may lead to hotkey conflicts, unexpected capture behavior, or resource contention, slowing down your system.
conflict_categories.recommended_action: Stick to one primary screenshot or screen recording tool to avoid conflicts and ensure reliable functionality.

conflict_categories.name: Password Managers
conflict_categories.description: Activating multiple password manager extensions can cause auto-fill conflicts, duplicate entries, data synchronization issues, or even create security vulnerabilities if not managed carefully.
conflict_categories.recommended_action: It is highly recommended to use only one password manager extension to avoid data corruption, auto-fill errors, and potential security gaps.

conflict_categories.name: Grammar & Writing Assistants
conflict_categories.description: Multiple grammar checking extensions can interfere with each other's text analysis, causing performance issues, conflicting suggestions, or text input problems.
conflict_categories.recommended_action: Choose one grammar checking extension and disable others to ensure consistent writing assistance.

conflict_categories.name: Dark Mode Extensions
conflict_categories.description: Running multiple dark mode extensions simultaneously can cause visual glitches, website rendering issues, and performance degradation due to conflicting CSS injections.
conflict_categories.recommended_action: Use only one dark mode extension. Browser-built-in dark mode is preferred for best compatibility.

conflict_categories.name: New Tab Customizers
conflict_categories.description: Multiple new tab extensions will conflict with each other, causing redirect loops, broken new tab pages, or unwanted homepage changes.
conflict_categories.recommended_action: Keep only one new tab customization extension active.

deprecated_extensions.name: The Great Suspender (Original)
deprecated_extensions.reason: This extension was removed from the Chrome Web Store due to reports of malware and malicious activity. It poses a significant security risk.
deprecated_extensions.recommended_action: Immediately uninstall this extension. It is unsafe to keep installed.

deprecated_extensions.name: Honey
deprecated_extensions.reason: While popular, some versions or behaviors of this extension have been reported as potentially problematic, including data collection practices or aggressive pop-ups. Review its permissions carefully.
deprecated_extensions.recommended_action: Review its permissions and consider if you are comfortable with its data access. Browser-built-in features or other reputable alternatives might offer similar functionality with fewer concerns.

alternatives.name: Browser's built-in coupon features (e.g., Chrome's Shopping)

deprecated_extensions.name: SaveFrom.net Helper
deprecated_extensions.reason: This extension has been associated with adware, unwanted software, and potential privacy issues. It often modifies search results or injects ads.
deprecated_extensions.recommended_action: Uninstall this extension. Use official platform features or well-vetted, reputable download tools for media.

deprecated_extensions.name: Web of Trust (WOT)
deprecated_extensions.reason: Previously faced significant privacy concerns regarding user browsing data collection and sale. Although newer versions claim improvements, caution is still advised due to its history.
deprecated_extensions.recommended_action: Consider using built-in browser security features or alternative, transparent security extensions.

deprecated_extensions.name: Good Tab
deprecated_extensions.reason: Exposes clipboard to remote third-party domains via insecure HTTP, enabling clipboard-read and clipboard-write permissions to suspicious domains. Contains hidden tracking scripts and Baidu analytics. Could enable clipboard-based attacks including cryptocurrency address swapping.
deprecated_extensions.recommended_action: Immediately uninstall this extension. It has full clipboard access to a remote server and poses severe privacy and security risks.

deprecated_extensions.name: Children Protection
deprecated_extensions.reason: Implements functionality to harvest cookies, inject ads, and execute arbitrary JavaScript by contacting a remote server. Disguised as a parental control tool but performs malicious data collection.
deprecated_extensions.recommended_action: Immediately uninstall this extension. It harvests browser cookies and can execute arbitrary remote code.

deprecated_extensions.name: DPS Websafe
deprecated_extensions.reason: Changes default search to one under attacker control to capture search terms and potentially route users to malicious websites. Performs unauthorized search hijacking.
deprecated_extensions.recommended_action: Uninstall immediately. This extension hijacks your search queries and may redirect you to malicious sites.

deprecated_extensions.name: Stock Informer
deprecated_extensions.reason: Contains a known cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability (CVE-2020-28707) that could allow remote attackers to execute JavaScript code. Susceptible to exploitation for malicious code execution.
deprecated_extensions.recommended_action: Uninstall this extension due to known security vulnerabilities that could allow remote code execution.

deprecated_extensions.name: Chat GPT for Chrome with GPT-5, Claude Sonnet & DeepSeek AI
deprecated_extensions.reason: Malicious imposter extension that exfiltrates ChatGPT and DeepSeek conversations, browsing history, and internal URLs to attacker-controlled servers every 30 minutes. Stole data from 600,000+ users. Had Google's 'Featured' badge despite being malware.
deprecated_extensions.recommended_action: Immediately uninstall and change passwords for all accounts accessed while this extension was active. Review ChatGPT history for sensitive data.

deprecated_extensions.name: AI Sidebar with Deepseek, ChatGPT, Claude and more
deprecated_extensions.reason: Part of the same malicious campaign as 'Chat GPT for Chrome'. Exfiltrates AI conversations and browsing data to deepaichats.com C2 server. Collected data from 300,000+ users under false pretense of 'anonymous analytics'.
deprecated_extensions.recommended_action: Immediately uninstall. Change passwords and review all AI conversations for exposed sensitive information.

deprecated_extensions.name: CL Suite by @CLMasters
deprecated_extensions.reason: Marketed as a Meta Business Suite tool but secretly exfiltrates TOTP 2FA codes, Business Manager contact lists, and analytics data to attacker infrastructure (getauth.pro). Can forward stolen data to Telegram channels controlled by threat actors.
deprecated_extensions.recommended_action: Immediately uninstall. Rotate all Meta/Facebook passwords, regenerate 2FA seeds, and review Business Manager access logs for unauthorized activity.

deprecated_extensions.name: Phantom Shuttle (Variant 1)
deprecated_extensions.reason: Credential-stealing proxy extension that intercepts web traffic from 170+ services. Operates as a subscription-based service but funnels all traffic through attacker-controlled servers. Active since 2017, stole data from ~2,000 users.
deprecated_extensions.recommended_action: Immediately uninstall. Change ALL passwords for accounts used while this extension was active. Review financial accounts for unauthorized access.

deprecated_extensions.name: Phantom Shuttle (Variant 2)
deprecated_extensions.reason: Second variant of the Phantom Shuttle malicious proxy network. Same infrastructure and developer as the original. Intercepts credentials and web traffic from numerous online services.
deprecated_extensions.recommended_action: Immediately uninstall and rotate all credentials for accounts accessed while installed.

deprecated_extensions.name: Safery: Ethereum Wallet
deprecated_extensions.reason: Fake cryptocurrency wallet that steals seed phrases by encoding them into synthetic Sui-style addresses hidden in blockchain transactions. Uses microtransactions to exfiltrate victim recovery phrases to attackers.
deprecated_extensions.recommended_action: Immediately uninstall. If you entered any seed phrase, assume the wallet is compromised. Create new wallets with new seed phrases and transfer funds immediately.

deprecated_extensions.name: MetaMask (Fake/Impersonator)
deprecated_extensions.note: This ID represents known fake impersonators. Verify official ID matches exactly.
deprecated_extensions.reason: Fake impersonator of the legitimate MetaMask wallet. Steals cryptocurrency wallet credentials and private keys. Many variants exist with slight name variations.
deprecated_extensions.recommended_action: Verify you have the official MetaMask extension from metamask.io. Uninstall any suspicious variants immediately and transfer funds to new wallets if seed phrases were entered.

deprecated_extensions.name: ChatGPT Folder Master
deprecated_extensions.reason: One of 16 malicious ChatGPT extensions stealing session tokens. Part of coordinated campaign by single threat actor. Steals authentication tokens to hijack ChatGPT accounts and access conversation history.
deprecated_extensions.recommended_action: Uninstall immediately. Log out of all ChatGPT sessions and change your OpenAI password. Review connected apps and revoke suspicious sessions.

deprecated_extensions.name: ChatGPT Prompt Genius
deprecated_extensions.reason: Fake ChatGPT extension stealing session tokens. Part of the LayerX-discovered campaign of 16 malicious extensions. Intercepts authorization headers to steal session data.
deprecated_extensions.recommended_action: Uninstall immediately and rotate ChatGPT credentials. Check for unauthorized API key usage in your OpenAI account.

deprecated_extensions.name: ChatGPT History
deprecated_extensions.reason: Malicious extension from the 16-extension campaign. Steals ChatGPT session tokens and sends them to attacker-controlled backend. Can access all conversations and connected services.
deprecated_extensions.recommended_action: Uninstall immediately. Review ChatGPT history for exposed sensitive data and change your password.

deprecated_extensions.name: ChatGPT Quick Access
deprecated_extensions.reason: Session token stealer from coordinated ChatGPT extension campaign. Intercepts authentication data to hijack accounts.
deprecated_extensions.recommended_action: Uninstall immediately and secure your OpenAI account.

deprecated_extensions.name: GPT-4 Assistant
deprecated_extensions.reason: Fake GPT-4 extension stealing user session tokens. Part of the 16-extension malicious network. Can impersonate users and access connected services like Slack and GitHub.
deprecated_extensions.recommended_action: Uninstall immediately. Check GitHub, Slack, and other connected services for unauthorized access.

deprecated_extensions.name: ChatGPT Voice
deprecated_extensions.reason: Malicious voice extension that steals ChatGPT authentication tokens. Part of coordinated campaign. Promises voice features but delivers account hijacking.
deprecated_extensions.recommended_action: Uninstall immediately and review account security.

deprecated_extensions.name: ChatGPT Export Tool
deprecated_extensions.reason: Fake export tool stealing session tokens. Part of 16-extension malicious network. Intercepts ChatGPT authentication data.
deprecated_extensions.recommended_action: Uninstall immediately.

deprecated_extensions.name: ChatGPT Theme Customizer
deprecated_extensions.reason: Malicious theme extension from coordinated campaign. Steals session tokens while pretending to offer UI customization.
deprecated_extensions.recommended_action: Uninstall immediately.

deprecated_extensions.name: ChatGPT Search
deprecated_extensions.reason: Fake search extension stealing ChatGPT credentials. Part of the LayerX-discovered malicious network.
deprecated_extensions.recommended_action: Uninstall immediately.

deprecated_extensions.name: Free VPN Proxy
deprecated_extensions.reason: Generic name used by multiple malicious VPN extensions. Often contains traffic logging, ad injection, or credential theft. Many variants exist with similar names.
deprecated_extensions.recommended_action: Uninstall and use reputable VPN services only. Free VPNs often monetize by selling user data or injecting ads.

deprecated_extensions.name: Unblock Websites
deprecated_extensions.reason: Generic proxy extension often associated with traffic interception and data logging. Frequently changes ownership and injects ads or malicious scripts.
deprecated_extensions.recommended_action: Uninstall and use reputable VPN services with clear privacy policies.

deprecated_extensions.name: AdBlocker Ultimate (Fake)
deprecated_extensions.reason: Fake version of legitimate ad blocker. Contains affiliate injection, tracking scripts, or allows 'acceptable ads' from paying advertisers without disclosure.
deprecated_extensions.recommended_action: Verify you have the legitimate AdBlocker Ultimate. Uninstall suspicious versions.

deprecated_extensions.name: PDF Converter (Suspicious)
deprecated_extensions.reason: Generic PDF tool often associated with ad injection, search hijacking, or data collection. Many variants with similar names exist in the 'shovelware' category.
deprecated_extensions.recommended_action: Review permissions carefully. Consider using built-in browser PDF features or reputable alternatives.

deprecated_extensions.name: New Tab - Custom Start Page
deprecated_extensions.reason: Frequently associated with search hijacking, affiliate injection, and unwanted pop-ups. Often bundled with other software.
deprecated_extensions.recommended_action: Uninstall if you experience unwanted search changes or pop-ups.

deprecated_extensions.name: My New Tab
deprecated_extensions.reason: Common name used by adware extensions that hijack new tab pages and inject sponsored content or tracking.
deprecated_extensions.recommended_action: Uninstall if experiencing unwanted ads or search changes.

deprecated_extensions.name: Video Downloader Professional
deprecated_extensions.reason: Often contains adware, tracking scripts, or redirects to malicious sites. Many variants steal browsing data or inject unwanted ads.
deprecated_extensions.recommended_action: Uninstall and use official platform download features or reputable desktop software.

deprecated_extensions.name: Screen Recorder
deprecated_extensions.reason: Generic screen recorder often associated with excessive permissions, data collection, or bundling with unwanted software.
deprecated_extensions.recommended_action: Review permissions. Consider using built-in OS screen recording or reputable dedicated software.

deprecated_extensions.name: Coupon Finder Pro
deprecated_extensions.reason: Aggressive affiliate extension that may inject ads, track browsing history excessively, or redirect through affiliate links without disclosure.
deprecated_extensions.recommended_action: Review permissions and privacy policy. Consider built-in browser coupon features.

deprecated_extensions.name: Shopping Assistant
deprecated_extensions.reason: Generic shopping tool often associated with excessive price tracking, data collection, and affiliate injection without clear disclosure.
deprecated_extensions.recommended_action: Review what data is being collected. Consider if the savings justify the privacy trade-off.

deprecated_extensions.name: Free Download Manager
deprecated_extensions.reason: Often bundled with adware or potentially unwanted programs. Some variants redirect downloads or inject ads.
deprecated_extensions.recommended_action: Verify source is legitimate. Consider using browser's built-in download manager.

deprecated_extensions.name: Grammar and Spell Checker
deprecated_extensions.reason: Generic grammar tool that may collect all typed text and send to remote servers for analysis without adequate privacy protection.
deprecated_extensions.recommended_action: Review privacy policy carefully. Consider reputable alternatives with clear data handling practices.

deprecated_extensions.name: Dark Mode Pro
deprecated_extensions.reason: Generic dark mode extension that may inject ads, track browsing, or have excessive permissions for its functionality.
deprecated_extensions.recommended_action: Consider using browser's built-in dark mode or reputable alternatives with fewer permissions.

deprecated_extensions.name: Merlin - AI Powered Assistant (Fake)
deprecated_extensions.reason: Fake impersonator of the legitimate Merlin extension. May steal data or inject malicious scripts. Verify official ID.
deprecated_extensions.recommended_action: Verify extension ID matches official source. Uninstall if suspicious.

credential_theft.description: Extensions that steal login credentials, session tokens, or authentication data

data_exfiltration.description: Extensions that send user data to remote servers without adequate disclosure

financial_theft.description: Extensions targeting cryptocurrency wallets or financial data

traffic_interception.description: Extensions that route traffic through attacker-controlled infrastructure

supply_chain_compromise.description: Legitimate extensions compromised through malicious updates

warning_signs: Requests excessive permissions unrelated to stated functionality
Large number of identical or similar extensions from same developer
Promises features that seem too good to be true (free VPN, unlimited downloads)
No clear privacy policy or data handling practices
Recently added 'Featured' badge with few reviews
Obfuscated or minified code without clear purpose

before_installing: Check reviews for mentions of unwanted behavior
Research the extension on security forums
after_installing: Monitor network traffic for unexpected connections
Check for unexpected browser behavior (new tabs, search changes)
Keep extensions updated but verify updates manually for critical tools
